bird.name: Blue paradise flycatcher
bird.summary: The blue paradise flycatcher (Terpsiphone cyanescens) is a species of bird in the family Monarchidae. It is endemic to Palawan.

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

locations.name: 原始森林
locations.summary: 原始森林又稱原生林，是指一个森林已经达到非常非常长久的年龄而没有遭到显著的干扰，成功表现出独特的生态特征，并可能被归类为顶极群落。原生特性包括多样化的树有关的结构，提供多样化的野生动物栖息地，增加了森林生态系统的生物多样性。多样化的树结构…

locations.id: loc-普林塞萨港地下河国家公园-656774b8
locations.name: 普林塞萨港地下河国家公园
locations.summary: 普林塞萨港地下河国家公园（英語：Puerto Princesa Subterranean River National Park），台湾譯作公主港地下河國家公園，為菲律宾一處自然保护区，位於菲律賓島群呂宋部份西南部的巴拉望島。該公園於19…

relations.subject: Blue paradise flycatcher
relations.evidence: It is mainly found in the understory of lowland primary and secondary forests, however populations are likely to be declining owing to habitat loss

relations.subject: Blue paradise flycatcher
relations.evidence: The species inhabits tropical moist lowland primary forest and secondary forest up restricted to the lowlands

relations.subject: Blue paradise flycatcher
relations.evidence: It is assessed as least-concern under the IUCN with populations believed to be decreasing due to habitat loss and deforestation
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Blue paradise flycatcher

relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
